name: create-t3-app
description: A CLI for creating web applications with the t3 stack

name: --noGit
options.description: Explicitly tell the CLI to not initialize a new git repo in the project (default: false)

name: --noInstall
options.description: Explicitly tell the CLI to not run the package manager's install command (default: false)

name: -y
--default
options.description: Bypass the CLI and use all default options to bootstrap a new t3-app (default: false)

name: --CI
options.description: Boolean value if we're running in CI (default: false)

name: --tailwind
options.description: Experimental: Boolean value if we should install Tailwind CSS. Must be used in conjunction with `--CI`

name: --nextAuth
options.description: Experimental: Boolean value if we should install NextAuth.js. Must be used in conjunction with `--CI`

name: --prisma
options.description: Experimental: Boolean value if we should install Prisma. Must be used in conjunction with `--CI`

name: --trpc
options.description: Experimental: Boolean value if we should install tRPC. Must be used in conjunction with `--CI`

name: -i
--import-alias
options.description: Explicitly tell the CLI to use a custom import alias

args.name: dir
args.description: The name of the application, as well as the name of the directory to create
